description: Liberty Media Corporation announced it will host a conference call on November 7, 2024 to discuss third quarter results.
Liberty Media Corporation announced it will hold its annual Investor Meeting on November 14, 2024
Liberty Media Corporation released financial results for the third quarter ended September 30 2024
CEO Gregory Maffei to resign in 2024 with John Malone as interim; company plans to Split-Off Liberty Live, Inc.
Liberty Media Corporation appointed Chase Carey to its Board of Directors and named Robert R. Bennett Vice Chairman effective January 1 2025.
Liberty Media extended the Longstop Date for its acquisition of Dorna Sports, S.L. and will pay a €126 million upfront amount.
Derek Chang appointed President and CEO effective February 1 2025 with $2.5 million base salary and $150000 signing bonus
Liberty Media Corporation announced it will host a conference call on February 27, 2025 to discuss fourth quarter 2024 results.
Liberty Media Corporation announced it will hold its virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 12, 2025.
Liberty Media Corporation released financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31 2024
Newell Brands Inc. reported financial results for the third quarter ended September 30 2024
Newell Brands Inc. entered an underwriting agreement for $750 million 6.375% notes and $500 million 6.625% notes to redeem debt.
Newell Brands Inc. closed the sale of $1.25 billion in senior notes and entered supplemental indentures with U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association.
target_or_counterparty: U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association

description: Newell Brands Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31 2024
Newell Brands Inc. approved the 2025 Long-Term Incentive Plan and bonus program for named executive officers, including CEO Christopher Peterson.
Co-President Doug Robinson will retire effective January 31 2025 and serve as an advisor through October 31 2025.
Workday appointed Robert Enslin as President and Chief Commercial Officer and Sayan Chakraborty as President of Product and Technology effective December 2 2024
Workday Inc. announced financial results for its fiscal third quarter ended October 31 2024
Workday Inc. appointed Elizabeth Centoni to its Board of Directors and granted her $750,000 in restricted stock units.
Workday announced a restructuring plan to eliminate approximately 1,750 positions and expects to incur $230 million to $270 million in total charges.
Workday appointed Gerrit Kazmaier as President of Product and Technology and announced the retirement of Sayan Chakraborty effective March 10 2025.
Workday Inc. announced financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ended January 31 2025
